not_registered.label: Not Registered
not_registered.description: You need to register as a voter first

registered.label: Registered Voter
registered.description: You are registered. Let's prepare for election day.

ready_to_vote.label: Ready to Vote
ready_to_vote.description: You're all set! Here's what to expect on election day.

steps.title: Check Eligibility
steps.description: Verify you meet the requirements to vote.
details: Must be 18+ on qualifying date (Jan 1st of electoral roll revision year)
Must be resident of the constituency
Must not be disqualified under any law

steps.title: Gather Documents
details: Proof of age: Birth certificate, Class 10 marksheet, or passport
Proof of address: Aadhaar, utility bills, bank passbook, ration card

steps.title: Register Online/Offline
details: Offline: Visit nearest Electoral Registration Office

steps.title: Find Polling Booth
steps.description: Locate polling station for your constituency.
details: Search on voters.eci.gov.in with EPIC number
Station assigned based on registered address

steps.title: Prepare for Election Day
steps.description: Know what to carry and expect.
details: Carry Voter ID or approved photo ID
Approved: Aadhaar, Passport, DL, PAN, etc.
Check serial number in voter list

steps.title: Cast Your Vote
steps.description: The voting process at the station.
details: Show voter ID to polling officer
Press button next to chosen candidate on EVM
steps.action: Your vote is private and protected by law
